name_cn:
🎉New Aimee Crossbody Bag🎉1BC229 Small Size🎉🎉
This leather Hobo crossbody bag features a simple and elegant design, made from imported calfskin. It features a front metal triangle enamel logo and comes with a detachable leather shoulder strap. The leather is fine and soft, offering practicality, lightness, and a large capacity😉😉. It is versatile and another fashion hit. Get yours now, it's so beautiful👏👏
Length 31 x Height 18 x Base 10cm
